_comment: Maps CoTS album codes to canonical Album name + Era. Edit this file to refine era taxonomy. The Era column is computed from this lookup at build time.
_note_on_eras: Era taxonomy is coarse and based on Wikipedia's classification (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Taylor_Swift) at the level of stylistic continuity, not per-album genre. Four buckets group the 13 studio albums by broad creative phase; finer distinctions (e.g. Red as 'eclectic pop/rock', Reputation as 'trap-pop', TTPD as 'synth-pop', LSG as 'soft rock') are captured at the album level in the Album column, not the Era column. This choice trades granular genre labels for analytically useful groupings that show career-level trends without one-album buckets.
